# 524 Tracker

> Free credit card application rules tracker for points and miles enthusiasts. Track Chase 5/24 status, Amex lifetime bonus eligibility, Citi 8/65 rules, Bank of America 2/3/4 restrictions, and more — all stored locally in your browser, never sent to any server.

## Main Tools
- [Chase 5/24 Tracker](https://524tracker.com/): Track your Chase 5/24 card count and next eligibility date
- [Card Value Calculator](https://524tracker.com/card-value-calculator): Calculate the net value of a card after annual fee vs. benefits
- [Best Cards by Category](https://524tracker.com/best-cards-by-category): Find the highest-earning card for dining, travel, groceries, gas, and more
- [Top Cards](https://524tracker.com/top-cards): Best credit cards to apply for, optimized for points maximizers
- [Rules Guide](https://524tracker.com/rules-guide): Complete explanation of all major bank credit card application rules

## Blog
- [Blog](https://524tracker.com/blog): Expert guides on credit card application rules, churning strategies, and bank-specific restrictions
- [Chase 5/24 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/chase-5-24-rule-explained): Everything you need to know about Chase's 5/24 rule — what counts, what doesn't, and how to check your status
- [Amex Lifetime Bonus Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/amex-lifetime-bonus-rule-explained): The Amex lifetime rule means you can only earn a welcome bonus on each card once per lifetime
- [Citi 8/65 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/citi-8-65-rule-explained): The Citi 8/65 rule limits you to 1 Citi card every 8 days and 2 every 65 days
- [Bank of America 2/3/4 Rule: Complete Guide](https://524tracker.com/blog/bank-of-america-2-3-4-rule-explained): BoA limits approvals to 2 in 30 days, 3 in 12 months, and 4 in 24 months

## About
- [About](https://524tracker.com/about): About this tool and how it works
- [Privacy Policy](https://524tracker.com/privacy): All data stored locally in your browser — nothing sent to servers
- [Terms of Service](https://524tracker.com/terms): Terms of use

## Key Facts
- All tracking data stored in browser localStorage only — never transmitted to any server
- No account or login required
- Free to use, supported by advertising and card affiliate links
- Rules based on community knowledge from r/churning — always verify with card issuer before applying
